codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the portal closure showed a focused fix set aligned to the remaining PR #100 comments: `CompanyContextFilter` now treats `/api/v1/audit` as a tenant business surface, RBAC synchronization ordering moved behind role-seeding startup work through `RbacSynchronizationConfig` and `RoleService`, and the matching auth/RBAC regression suites were updated in the same packet. The branch-local parity-related docs evidence and R2 checkpoint changes stayed consistent with the packet scope, and the current milestone validators passed, so this review passes on reachable commit `9933ec4f82d0b95453218cfb2c1c375c5c916cd6` (`fix(portal): close remaining PR #100 live comments`).

summary: Pass. The narrowed PR #100 live-comment closure is review-clean on commit `9933ec4f82d0b95453218cfb2c1c375c5c916cd6`, preserving audit isolation and first-boot RBAC synchronization ordering.
